vocab.meaning: độc nhất vô nhị, không tuân theo quy tắc thông thường
vocab.example: The latest redesign of that art portal is a law unto itself; it completely disregards traditional grid layouts for something much more avant-garde.

vocab.word: separate the sheep from the goats
vocab.meaning: phân biệt nhóm chất lượng cao và nhóm tầm thường
vocab.example: The introduction of verified badges and rigorous content filters has really helped to separate the sheep from the goats on that forum.

vocab.meaning: phần giá trị nhất, tuyệt vời nhất
vocab.example: While the entire site was updated, the new interactive 3D archive is definitely the jewel in the crown of their recent overhaul.

vocab.word: know which way the wind blows
vocab.meaning: nắm bắt được xu hướng, tình hình thực tế
vocab.example: By integrating AI search features early on, the developers proved they know which way the wind blows in the tech industry.

vocab.meaning: ở vị trí quan trọng/khó khăn nhất của một hoạt động
vocab.example: This coding website stays at the sharp end of software development by updating its tutorials every time a new framework version is released.
Video content now takes up the lion's share of the homepage, whereas it used to be mostly text-based articles.

vocab.meaning: nỗ lực hết sức để đạt kết quả tốt nhất
vocab.example: The team pulled out all the stops for the anniversary update, introducing a completely seamless mobile experience.

vocab.meaning: theo dõi rất kỹ để phát hiện thay đổi hoặc vấn đề
vocab.example: I keep a weather eye on the security updates of my banking site, as they are constantly patching new vulnerabilities.
Dark mode and minimalist interfaces are all the rage now, and almost every site I visit has adopted this aesthetic recently.

vocab.meaning: đạt được kỳ vọng, đủ tốt để thành công
vocab.example: The old site was clunky, but the new, streamlined version definitely cuts the mustard when it comes to user speed and efficiency.
